description: Adapted from Grafana official k6 Prometheus dashboard (ID: 19665) for OpenLoadHub. Changed testid -> recordId to match the agent label.

links.title: Grafana k6 OSS Docs: Prometheus Remote Write
links.tooltip: Open docs in a new tab

panels.description: 当前时刻的 QPS 值；使用与峰值面板相同的 10 秒窗口 QPS 序列。
展示全 run 当前驻留/已初始化的 VUs 总量（raw k6_vus_max）；比瞬时 busy VUs 更适合作为主读数，不等于场景容量上限 maxVUs。
panels.title: 当前驻留 VUs

panels.description: 统一按区间均值速率展示 overall iterations，并补接口级请求速率；避免负载切换时的单点尖刺放大。
panels.title: 吞吐 QPS（迭代 / 接口）

panels.description: 优先展示实时迭代时长趋势；若短样本无法支撑 rate()，则诚实回退为全区间统计值。

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or avg_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_p99{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(recordId) (last_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or avg_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_p95{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId) (last_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_avg(sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or avg_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_avg{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or histogram_avg(sum by(recordId) (last_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: 迭代处理时长趋势

panels.description: 当前卡片展示所选时间窗内可见的驻留/已初始化 VUs 总量（raw k6_vus_max）。
panels.title: 当前驻留 VUs

panels.description: 当前时间范围内的 QPS 峰值；不是全运行周期峰值，而是当前图表时间范围内这条 10 秒窗口 QPS 序列的最大点。

targets.expr: ((sum(increase(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", expected_response="false"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + (histogram_count(sum by(recordId, name, status) (increase(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", status!="0"}[$__range]))) or vector(0)))

panels.title: 失败请求数

panels.description: 展示 HTTP counter 与 gRPC histogram count 的区间内最后可见总量，便于与请求明细和运行输入对照。

targets.expr: ((sum(max_over_time(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])) or sum(increase(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])) or vector(0)) + ((histogram_count(sum(last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range]))) or histogram_count(sum(increase(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range]))) or vector(0))))

panels.title: 总请求数量

panels.description: 展示当前窗口末尾可见的 P95 迭代时长，作为下方趋势图的摘要读数；若短样本无法支撑 rate()，则诚实回退为全区间统计值。

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or avg_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_p95{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId) (last_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: 迭代处理时长 P95（当前值）

panels.description: 统一按区间均值传输速率展示网络收发，避免负载切换时的单点尖刺放大。
panels.title: 网络数据传输速率

panels.description: 优先展示实时迭代时长；若短样本无法支撑 rate()，则诚实回退为全区间统计值。

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or avg_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_p99{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(recordId) (last_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or avg_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_p95{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId) (last_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or avg_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_med{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(recordId) (last_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_avg(sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or avg_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_avg{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]) or histogram_avg(sum by(recordId) (last_over_time(k6_iteration_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])))

panels.title: 迭代处理时长

panels.description: 优先展示 HTTP/gRPC 接口级实时 avg 耗时；若短样本无法支撑 rate()，则诚实回退为全区间统计值。

targets.expr: histogram_avg(sum by(recordId, name) (rate(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[10s]))) or histogram_avg(sum by(recordId, name) (last_over_time(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])))

histogram_avg(sum by(recordId, name) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[10s]))) or histogram_avg(sum by(recordId, name) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])))

panels.title: 接口 Avg 耗时分布

panels.description: 优先展示 HTTP/gRPC 接口级实时 P95 耗时；若短样本无法支撑 rate()，则诚实回退为全区间统计值。

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId, name) (rate(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[10s]))) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId, name) (last_over_time(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId, name) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[10s]))) or histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(recordId, name) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])))

panels.title: 接口 P95 耗时分布

panels.description: 优先展示 HTTP/gRPC 接口级实时 P99 耗时；若短样本无法支撑 rate()，则诚实回退为全区间统计值。

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(recordId, name) (rate(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[10s]))) or histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(recordId, name) (last_over_time(k6_http_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(recordId, name) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[10s]))) or histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(recordId, name) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])))

panels.title: 接口 P99 耗时分布

panels.description: Select a different Stat to change the query HTTP-specific built-in metrics
panels.title: Checks 成功率趋势

panels.description: 统一按区间均值 QPS 展示请求速率构成，避免负载切换时的单点尖刺放大。

targets.expr: ((sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval])) or vector(0)) + (histogram_count(sum by(recordId) (rate(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__rate_interval]))) or vector(0)))

panels.title: 请求速率构成（实时QPS/区间均值）

panels.description: 统一按区间均值成功请求 QPS 展示 http/grpc 成功速率，避免负载切换时的单点尖刺放大。
panels.title: http&grpc正确请求速率（实时QPS/区间均值）

panels.description: 优先展示区间内最后可见 counter 总量，使其更接近结果层请求总量；若窗口不足以拿到稳定 counter，再回退到区间新增请求数。

targets.expr: sum by(recordId, name, method, status) (max_over_time(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])) or sum by(recordId, name, method, status) (increase(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])) or label_replace((histogram_count(sum by(recordId, name, status) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range]))) or histogram_count(sum by(recordId, name, status) (increase(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}"}[$__range])))), "method", "GRPC", "name", ".*")

sum by(recordId, name, method, status) (max_over_time(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", expected_response="true"}[$__range])) or sum by(recordId, name, method, status) (increase(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", expected_response="true"}[$__range])) or label_replace((histogram_count(sum by(recordId, name, status) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", status="0"}[$__range]))) or histogram_count(sum by(recordId, name, status) (increase(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", status="0"}[$__range])))), "method", "GRPC", "name", ".*")

sum by(recordId, name, method, status) (max_over_time(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", expected_response="false"}[$__range])) or sum by(recordId, name, method, status) (increase(k6_http_reqs_total{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", expected_response="false"}[$__range])) or label_replace((histogram_count(sum by(recordId, name, status) (last_over_time(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", status!="0"}[$__range]))) or histogram_count(sum by(recordId, name, status) (increase(k6_grpc_req_duration_seconds{recordId=~"${recordId:regex}", status!="0"}[$__range])))), "method", "GRPC", "name", ".*")

panels.title: 请求明细

panels.description: Filter by check name to query a particular check
panels.title: Checks成功率趋势图

options.content: ### Visualize other k6 results At the top of the dashboard, click `Add` and select `Visualization` from the dropdown menu. Choose the visualization type and input the PromQL queries for the `k6_` metric(s). Alternatively, click on the `Explore` icon on the menu bar and input the queries for the `k6_` metric(s). From `Explore`, you can add new Panels to this dashboard. Note that all k6 metrics are prefixed with the `k6_` namespace when sent to Prometheus.

list.description: Statistic for Trend Metrics Queries. The available options depend on the values of the K6_PROMETHEUS_RW_TREND_STATS setting.
list.label: Trend Metrics Query
list.name: quantile_stat

list.description: Adhoc filters are applied to all panels. To enable it, go to Dashboard Settings / Variables / adhoc_filter and select the target Prometheus data source.
list.label: AdhocFilter
list.name: adhoc_filter

title: K6 Prometheus Dashboard (OpenLoadHub)
